description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses node:latest as the default Docker image and overrides it with node:8 for the build-project job, and caches the node_modules directory. Add a build-project job (runs in the default test stage) that executes the exact commands: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release", produces artifacts covering coverage/, doc/ and dist/ that expire in 1 day, and records test coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Then add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ to .public/coverage/, moves doc/ to .public/doc/, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires in 90 days.
